# Physical Security RFPs

Discover physical security RFP opportunities from government facilities, courthouses, and secure installations. Find solicitations for access control systems, surveillance cameras, security guards, and perimeter security updated daily.

[**Access Control, Video Surveillance, and Security System**](https://starbridge.ai/rfp/bid-26-10-access-control-video-surveillance-and-security) Available

[City of Cape May](https://starbridge.ai/buyer/city-of-cape-may)

Contractor shall provide all labor, supervision, programming, configuration, mounting hardware, testing, startup, and commissioning required for a complete turnkey installation. B. The work shall include, but not be limited to: i. Electronic access control system ii. Card reader and keypad reader installation iii. Door controllers and locking integration iv. Interior and exterior ip-based video surveillance cameras v. Multi-sensor panoramic camera systems vi. Wireless panic/duress notification devices vii. Alarm panel integration viii. Cloud or enterprise management licensing ix. System training and documentation x. Final testing and commissioning.

Posted Date

Release: Jun 17, 2026

Due Date

Close: Aug 25, 2026

Timeline Progress47%

[View Details →](https://starbridge.ai/rfp/bid-26-10-access-control-video-surveillance-and-security)

[**Access Control and Surveillance at 9 Osgood (Pace Building)**](https://starbridge.ai/rfp/access-control-and-surveillance-at-9-osgood-pace) Available

[City of Joliet](https://starbridge.ai/buyer/city-of-joliet-0)

The City of Joliet, Illinois is soliciting sealed proposals through RFP #2991-0826 for the installation of an integrated access control and surveillance (door hardware and camera) system at the 9 S Osgood Street facility, formerly the Pace Heritage Division garage. A mandatory pre-bid meeting is scheduled for July 13, 2026 at 10:00 AM CDT and all vendor questions must be submitted by 4:00 PM CDT that same day. All bids must be submitted electronically through the City's Euna Procurement (Bonfire) portal by 10:00 AM CDT on Tuesday, July 21, 2026, at which time they will be publicly opened and read.

Posted Date

Release: Jun 24, 2026

Due Date

Close: Jul 21, 2026

Timeline Progress93%

[View Details →](https://starbridge.ai/rfp/access-control-and-surveillance-at-9-osgood-pace)

[**RFI - Physical Access Control System Solution**](https://starbridge.ai/rfp/rfi-physical-access-control-system-solution)

[State University of New York System Office](https://starbridge.ai/buyer/state-university-construction-fund)

The State University of New York (SUNY) - University at Albany is issuing a Request for Information (RFI#06162026JH) for a Physical Access Control System Solution to enhance security across its campuses. UAlbany manages 30,000 to 40,000 active access control accounts across 154 buildings on a 479-acre campus, and is gathering market information on electronic physical access control products and services that can scale to 4,000+ access control locations with robust reporting, analytics, and integration with existing enterprise systems. The RFI was released on June 22, 2026 and responses are due by July 17, 2026, with the contract to be performed at the University at Albany campuses in Albany, New York.

Posted Date

Release: Jun 22, 2026

Due Date

Close: Jul 17, 2026

[**EF937-261203 Video surveillance system (CCTV) on a federal site**](https://starbridge.ai/rfp/ef937-261203-video-surveillance-system-cctv-on-a) Available

[Canada Border Services Agency](https://starbridge.ai/buyer/canada-border-services-agency-0)

This is a Request for Proposal (Solicitation WS5765476355, reference EF937-261203) issued by Public Works and Government Services Canada (PWGSC) on behalf of the Canada Border Services Agency (CBSA). The selected qualified contractor must design, procure, install, configure, program, train staff, commission, and test a new comprehensive video surveillance (CCTV) system at a federal site located within 100 kilometres of Montreal, Quebec. The tender follows competitive open-bidding procurement with the lowest price as the selection criterion, and is subject to multiple Canadian and international trade agreements.

[Gateway Technical College](https://starbridge.ai/buyer/gateway-technical-college-1)

The College is seeking proposals for installation and equipment related to ongoing repair and updates to our current camera and door access system that would complement existing campus-wide security efforts for the general safety of students, staff, guests, and to help protect the assets of the college from vandalism or theft. This would include the installation of new camera and door access equipment to expand and improve our current system as the need and opportunity arises and replace current equipment as it ages out.

[W6QK Army Contracting Command (ACC) Pica](https://starbridge.ai/buyer/acc-new-jersey-center-for-contracting-and-commerce-0)

The U.S. Army Contracting Command - New Jersey (ACC-NJ), located at Picatinny Arsenal, NJ, is soliciting proposals to competitively select and award multiple firm-fixed-price (FFP) Blanket Purchase Agreements (BPAs) for Security, Access Control and Building Management Systems. The awarded BPAs will be used for the repair, modification, and modernization of electronic security alarm systems, access control systems, and building management systems at Picatinny Arsenal, NJ (and Benet Labs, NY). This is an active federal solicitation posted on SAM.gov on July 8, 2026, with responses due by July 20, 2026.

[**Roster of Vendors for Capital Projects CCTV/ Access Control/ Intercom/ Alarm Intrusion/ Electromagnetic Locks/ Digital Signage**](https://starbridge.ai/rfp/roster-of-vendors-for-capital-projects-cctv-access) Available

[Toronto](https://starbridge.ai/buyer/toronto)

Toronto Community Housing (RFVQ 24036 - 2) is establishing a vendor roster to provide CCTV, access control, intercom, alarm intrusion, electromagnetic locks, and digital signage services for capital projects across the TCHC portfolio. Vendors will be asked to provide design and installation services and may be pre‑qualified on a roster to support future capital-project RFQs; the official posting is hosted on Toronto Community Housing’s Bonfire opportunity page. Questions are listed as due Sep 16, 2026 and submissions are due Sep 30, 2026 (14:00 local Toronto time), and the buyer’s Bonfire page is the authoritative source for response instructions and documents.

The U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (Galveston District) issued solicitation W912HY26RA023, “Relocation of Security/Surveillance System Equipment,” requesting a contractor to relocate existing security and surveillance system equipment at a specified Dallas, TX location.
